metadata.mode: confirmatory replay of published thresholds, NOT discovery preregistration
metadata.question: Can the published justitia headline results be replayed under fallacy-cutter enforcement?
metadata.metric: Published headline permanence, decoupling, stability, seed policy, leakage, tautology, and evaluation-oracle checks.
controls: Static anti-concentration alone must remain at published near-zero permanence.
Consequence/sword alone must remain below the published <=0.17 permanence ceiling.
Consequence-removed dynamic anti-concentration must have containment_events=0 and permanence=0.
W2/W5 must replay the published sensitivity classification: Type None fraction 1.000.

source_quotes.quote: Static anti-concentration alone fails (permanence approx 0 in every key world); pure consequence response alone fails (permanence <= 0.17).
without a consequence trigger ... containment_events = 0 ... permanence = 0
The verdict is threshold-stable. It holds in 100% of 54 perturbed viability-threshold combinations
In a pure-capture world or under monoculture shock, no blind configuration produces a robust kernel.
W6/W3/W4 AC+CG fraction 1.000; W2/W5 Type None fraction 1.000.
structural_ac_requires_consequence_gate true; C_dyn_no_consequence default permanence 0 and containment events 0 in W3/W4/W6; C_full defaults W3=0.8625, W4=0.7125, W6=1.000.
python run.py --smoke prints integrity checks PASS (7/7)

forbidden_name_sources: model/SPEC.md:L12-L16 hidden label and strategy parameters
metadata.what_was_not_shown: This replay is not independent replication and does not make the original study discovery-preregistered.

seed_provenance.source: model/atlas.py:L22 CORE_SEEDS_16 = list(range(16000, 16080)); results/run_manifest.json records smoke=false and num_runs=88800 for the published full run.

metadata.protocol: two-step: --run-study produces outputs/model_results + RUN_STAMP; the gate step fails closed unless a fresh full-mode RUN_STAMP is present, computes the tautology report from that snapshot, then runs run_gate over analysis only.
